news.t: T. ROWE PRICE ADDS TWO NEW INTERNATIONAL EQUITY ETFs TO ITS TRANSPARENT ACTIVE ETF OFFERINGS

holdings.infoBox: TGLB is an equity ETF with a total of 59 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 5.62%, Advanced Micro Devices at 5.42%, Apple at 5.28%, Alphabet at 3.94%, and Broadcom at 3.92%.

overview.description: The T. Rowe Price Global Equity ETF (TGLB) is an exchange-traded fund. The ETF currently has 22.92m in AUM and 57 holdings. TGLB is an actively managed fund that seeks long-term capital appreciation through investments in global equities, including emerging markets TGLB was launched on Jun 25, 2025 and is issued by T. Rowe Price.

data.text: The T. Rowe Price Global Equity ETF and International Equity Research ETF began trading today BALTIMORE , June 26, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- T. Rowe Price (NASDAQ-GS: TROW), a global investment management ...
